description: VMware 환경 정보 수집 및 관리 스크립트

commands.name: 환경 검증
commands.description: VCSA 환경 검증 — 도구, 서비스, DB 연결 상태 확인

commands.name: DB 테이블 목록
commands.command: /usr/lib/vmware-vpostgres/current/bin/psql -d VCDB -U vc -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' ORDER BY table_name;"

commands.name: VM 통계
commands.command: /usr/lib/vmware-vpostgres/current/bin/psql -d VCDB -U vc -t -c "SELECT power_state, COUNT(*) FROM vpx_vm GROUP BY power_state;"

commands.name: 호스트 통계
commands.command: /usr/lib/vmware-vpostgres/current/bin/psql -d VCDB -U vc -t -c "SELECT connection_state, COUNT(*) FROM vpx_host GROUP BY connection_state;"

commands.name: 스냅샷 목록
commands.command: /usr/lib/vmware-vpostgres/current/bin/psql -d VCDB -U vc -t -A -c "SELECT v.name, s.name, s.create_time FROM vpx_snapshot s JOIN vpx_vm v ON s.vm_id = v.id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC LIMIT 20;"

commands.name: 데이터스토어 사용량
commands.command: /usr/lib/vmware-vpostgres/current/bin/psql -d VCDB -U vc -t -A -F'|' -c "SELECT name, type, ROUND(capacity/1073741824.0,1), ROUND(free_space/1073741824.0,1) FROM vpx_datastore ORDER BY name;"

commands.name: NTP 설정 확인
commands.description: VCSA NTP 서버 및 동기화 상태

commands.name: 인증서 만료 빠른 확인
commands.command: for store in MACHINE_SSL_CERT machine vsphere-webclient vpxd; do echo "=== $store ==="; /usr/lib/vmware-vmafd/bin/vecs-cli entry list --store $store 2>/dev/null | grep Alias; done
commands.description: 주요 VECS 스토어 인증서 별칭 목록

commands.name: 네트워크 정보
commands.command: ip addr show | grep 'inet ' | grep -v '127.0.0.1'; echo '---'; ip route show default
commands.description: VCSA 네트워크 인터페이스 및 라우팅 정보
